channel.title: GNtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: JetBlue changes its boarding order with new groups
item.description: JetBlue will introduce a new boarding order with numbered groups starting on April 29, adding a new group for certain priority passengers.

item.title: Airlines are cutting routes in response to high fuel prices — here’s the latest
item.description: Air Canada, Delta Air Lines and Norse Atlantic are among the airlines suspending routes to cut fuel expenses.

item.title: 5 perks that make the Atmos Ascent Card worth more than its $95 annual fee
item.description: For Alaska and Hawaiian airline loyalists, the Atmos Ascent can be a valuable option at a low annual fee. Here's why this card is worth adding to your...

item.title: American Express Platinum: Valuable benefits and an offer as high as 175,000 bonus points
item.description: The American Express Platinum offers numerous statement credits, premium lounge access, elite hotel status and more. Here's the current offer.

item.title: United has hiked prices 5 times, says higher fares may stay for awhile
item.description: United Airlines has hiked prices five times since the start of the global run-up in oil prices, and higher costs for travelers could be here to stay.
